name: Inbound Carrier Sales
description: Acme Logistics inbound carrier sales — Inbound Voice Agent + Predefined Webhook trigger (Web Call test pattern, no phone numbers).

spec_alignment.spec: Do not buy a phone number on the platform. Use the web call trigger feature.
spec_alignment.shape: Inbound Voice Agent (event 0192e5dc-08df-78bf-a549-f43c6bf9f087) + Predefined Webhook trigger (event b329e750-...). No `to`, no `from_number`, no SIP-trunk routability check. The agent's `call` field references the trigger node — HR's editor 'Web Call' button creates a browser audio session bound to that trigger; the Inbound Voice Agent picks up the room and runs.
spec_alignment.why_not_outbound: Earlier we tried Outbound Voice Agent (matching HR's pre-built Voice Agent template) but it requires `to` + `from_number`. The trunk's outbound precheck rejected RFC 7042 test numbers as 'invalid outbound phone number' (run c10abc6b), and the org has no inbound SIP trunk on the only phone number anyway. Inbound Voice Agent has no such precheck.
spec_alignment.why_not_inbound_phone_trigger: Inbound to number trigger (event 0192a20c-cb70-7bf2-977a-b7edc14dcd66) requires a phone number with an inbound SIP trunk. The org's only number — Onboarding +16282142490 — has `Inbound Trunk: none`. Spec forbids buying a new number.

agent.name: Riley
agent.initial_message: Hi, thanks for calling Acme Logistics carrier sales — this is Riley. What lane are you running today?
